meta.title: relationship wrapped
meta.heroSubtext: I turned our conversations into something you can feel.

messages.text: 👀I don’t even know what to say but I wanna talk to you
I stared at your profile way too long trying to think of a clever opener… so here I am😂
Hectic looks like I got myself a stalker
Stalker is a strong word, I prefer “very curious admirer” 😂

Good… I was worried you were about to file a restraining order 😅
So besides accusing innocent people of stalking… what do you usually do for fun?
I go out with my friends
Why do I have a feeling you’re the one who convinces everyone to stay out way too late 😌

I knew it 😂 you definitely have “bad influence” energy.
I feel like going out with you would end with “just one more drink” turning into 5am.

Definitely 🤣
Mara I know my limits 😭
Okay can we put that to the test?
How about you get ready and then I’ll request for you, then we’ll see if we don’t get home at 5am😂
Yoh I can’t shem I’m still recovering from last night 😭

Okay fair… no wild night then 😌
Just come out for one chilled drink with me tonight. Doctor’s orders for recovery.

That’s exactly why we should meet 😂
Otherwise I’ll just remain the mysterious Instagram stalker forever.

Risky? 👀
Relax, we’re meeting somewhere public. If I’m weird you can escape after one drink 😂
Whatever is most convenient for you hey
Okay but one drink and then I’m going home to sleep 😭
Lol we were discussing you coming through
When you say that do you mean your place?
Well my initial ask was you coming home, so it’s not like you’re coming to my place the whole time
Inasmuch as I would love that though
Okay that’s tricky, I have a trip on that day for the week
Let me try make a plan and get back to you yeah
Might have to cancel my trip
Could have been better but it was ayt
Not yet hey, the prices of flights are quite mad right now so I’m still trying to see a workaround
I know that’s why I said I couldn’t let you do that. But there’s still June I’ll see you then
I’m sure we can even make a plan before then, if your schedule doesn’t allow then I’ll just come see you that side
It’s a Monday, back to back meetings so you can only imagine
What are you getting up to?
I just came back from campus I’m gonna do my laundry
What are you studying if you don’t mind me asking
And how’s that going for you?
Well look at you, that’s great hey
Have a goodnight and angels on your pillows
I eventually cancelled my trip so I’m outchea trying to see what your flights are looking like
Oh okay I’ll hear from you then
If you were coming over by me it wouldn’t be even be something I’d think about twice
I’m just saying I’m equally excited about seeing you as you are about going home
Kinda felt more like a topic of discussion
Yeah I would like to know whether you’d be open to that?
Is that your way of asking me?
😂😂😂allow me hey, I really struggled to find the right words to phrase it so that it doesn’t sound off

Yeah I totally understand, it’s quite the bone to chew on. But if it’s any consolation, there’s no expectations, I really just do want to spend time with you, get to know you better and see how things go from there
Yeah it’s big but I’ll think about it
We can narrow down on the logistics when you say yes if you still wanna go home and all

I hear you, but here’s my proposal. I can come and stay with you for a week before I go home but in June so that I’m comfortable. In the meantime we can still get to know each other. How do you feel about that?

Hey 😊I hear you, and I like that you’re being real about what makes you comfortable. June does sound like a safer plan, a whole week with me, I’m not mad at that at all 😌
I won’t lie though, I was kinda looking forward to seeing you sooner. But I’m good with building something properly in the meantime, just don’t blame me if by June you’re already too attached 👀
We’ll see about that, you sound confident tho🤭

I mean, should I not be? 😌
I feel like if you spend a week with me in June, you might start questioning why you waited that long 🤭
But it’s okay, I’ll let you take your time, for now
What would make me question that?😅

Hmmm I could tell you, but that would take the fun out of it 😌
Let’s just say it would involve good vibes, a bit of trouble, a lot of laughter and you not wanting to leave
I feel like you’d understand very quickly 🤭

😂 I like that you get me
I’m convinced you’re a bit trouble yourself though, I haven’t figured out how much yet
Should I be worried? 👀

Hmm I don’t know, I feel like you’re saying that now 😌
But I get the feeling you might be a little bit of trouble when you’re comfortable
I’ll take my chances though

Hey you 😊
You just popped into my mind and then there you are
How are you behaving today?

I’m good, better now actually 😊
What have you been up to today?
I had fun but I’m not that hung over
I’m glad you had fun and not hanging. What’s up for the day?
How much do you need for the thing?
Now that you’ve said so, I will
I tend to think I’m funny 😂but you didn’t say no so 🤷🏾‍♂️
How did the wine tasting go?
I’m glad you enjoyed yourself hey. Angels on your pillows ❤️

Good morning 😊
I feel like mornings got a little better ever since you started being part of them
How are you waking up today?
My morning is okay but it’s a little bit cold this side

I’m good 😊
But now that you said it’s cold, I feel like I should be there warming you up properly
You’re just out there struggling without me? 😌

😂 see this is why you were supposed to have come through
Now look at you fighting for your life
I can’t believe I’m letting you go through this like that

Honestly it depends who’s calling, but if it’s you, then I’d suddenly like them a lot more 😌
I can’t lie, I do enjoy hearing your voice
Okay I’ll call you more then
I like that, though I have a feeling your voice might become one of my favorite parts of the day 😌
Is the weather treating you better today
Atleast it’s warmer, it’s too early for winter to be coming along
Lol oh I’m always going to be complaining about work hey😂I’m working with unrealistic so it’s going to be one of those weeks
You’re on your break right? What are you getting up to?
What do you do actually? Never really asked you 😅
Nothing much, I’m gonna go to the beach on Thursday tho
I work in tech, I build stuff. But I studied law 🤦🏾‍♂️

And why are you being a homebody, you’re supposed to be enjoying your break?
Quite jealous, I miss the beach
But I’m enjoying it indoors too😂
I know😂I need help in life
Let me guess, spend most of the day on Netflix?
The new season of fatal seduction
I’ve actually never tried that out, is it nice?
Only because you said I should
Is it safe to assume you’re a romcom and soapie typa person? What else?
Okay and tell me what you think about it
Finally something we can watch together 😂we’re going to have interesting Netflix and chill nights
Honestly I can watch anything as long as it’s good. But yeah comedies and drama when I’m working then action/crime and horror when I’m chilling <This message was edited>
Yeah I do but sometimes I do go to the office
Let me get some work done while I watch fatal seduction 😂🤦🏾‍♂️
You’re actually evil for making me watch this alone😂😂😂and how was I supposed to concentrate on work?
The background noise was too loud 😅
I literally slammed my laptop shut so that I can rush to bed and call you back
Good morning beautiful ❤️hope you slept as well as I did though your voice kept replaying in my head the whole night (I’m not complaining though 😉)

I’m good 😊
Just trying to get through the day without getting distracted
You and your series are not helping though 😅
You can stop watching it and we’ll watch it together 😂
Let me act all strong and try soldier through atleast the 1st season 😂
Lol why though? What did you get up to
Not too bad actually, the heat is  just something else though
Nothing much just did my laundry today
Oh it’s hot that side neh
Oh yeah you really had a super chill day
Still doing the beach tomorrow? Is the weather atleast behaving now?
Not sure cos I think I’m getting sick. I’ve been coughing a lot today
But the weather said it might rain tomorrow
Take it easy and rest up properly and let me know if you need anything
I can’t have you getting sick now, I’ve just started enjoying that cute voice of yours 😌
I know you will 😊I’m still checking on you later though just to be sure babe😌

It’s not even 5am and somehow you’re already running through my mind
I just hope you wake up feeling better today 😊
The cough syrup is helping a little but it still hurts when I cough 💔
You’ll be okay, just keep taking your meds so long
Are you a gamer or it’s just curiosity?
But I think I’ve heard of it
Lol that’s chilled, but yeah I game a lot so you don’t have to worry yourself
I hope you won’t ignore me to play your games when I’m there🫢
Have you seen what you look like? I wouldn’t want to get my eyes off you even for a second
I’m sure it’s going to be nothing but just great vibes
At this rate I see making some impromptu plan before June 😂
And what do you wanna do for your birthday? That time it’s on a Monday 😂
I don’t know why I’m overly excited now
Please order me food I don’t think I’ll be able to cook💔
I’m literally going to be nagging you the whole time I’m there
I’m tempted to give you my virtual card, will I regret it?
They should be able to atleast give you something for the pain
I’ll asked my friend to go for me cos I’m very dizzy
Okay I’m sorry babe, please try get some rest so long
Hey, I just woke up I’m gonna go to the pharmacy may I use your card?
Add the card to your Apple wallet cause the CVV changes every couple of minutes
No I’m not getting anything hey
Yoh it redirects to download the FNB app
Can you please send it to my account instead
Yeah that’s fine, you’ll let me know how much then I’ll do an immediate transfer
Nah they’re really making you go through the most
Well I hope the meds you got will atleast help out
My mate came over so we’re playing fifa 👀
Okay atleast that’s a starting point. You need to try and eat again tonight
I’ll call you in abit hey
Aren’t you supposed to be napping
I was 😭my friend came to check on me
See why you need to get better now, you’ve got people outchea worried about you
I know and I appreciate you guys🥹❤️
By next week I’m gonna be fine🙂‍↕️
Did you try and eat before you go back to sleep?
I’m gonna finish the mashed potatoes before I go to sleep
It’s actually really good, i was abit exaggerative but it’s not that deep
The suspense kinda has me hooked cause now I just wanna know what happens in the end
Did you finish the first season ?
Yes, I’m done with the first season now
Sleep well and wake up feeling better ❤️
I was wondering why I’m tossing and turning here 😂
Now I really wish I was there to properly baby you 💔
But I’ll you in two weeks time😊
I know I know babe, it’s going to be a long 2 weeks though
We’ll be okay, atleast something to look forward to
It’s all good babe, get some rest❤️
Please tell me you’re feeling better?
Yeah I feel better than yesterday
I’m glad you’re feeling better, I was getting used to hearing your cute voice <This message was edited>
Yeah I’m lucky I didn’t lose my voice cos it usually happens when I’m sick
What are you doing today since it’s a holiday?
😂I’m sure you still sound cute like that
I think it’s going to be a chilled, just going to braii and play fifa with the mates
Are you in bed the whole day?😂
I’ll be here if you need someone to bore you 😂
I’ll enjoy on your behalf hey😂
You’ll probably be fine by the end of the day
Can I please order pads online with your card?
Look at you, I hope you’ll make it
Lol it’s chilled babe, there’s still the rest of the weekend
I thought I was getting better then I had a fever
I understand, but you atleast need to eat something proper tonight
Question should be did I even end up going 😂😂😂
Because my babe isn’t feeling well 😂
I legit was just feeling too lazy to jump out hey 😂
So you’ve been home all day?
I’m such a homebody though, so you better get used to that
This is actually such a lie 😂😂😂I’m probably going to go out tonight
Are you going to a club?
Not even hey, just the neighborhood bar for a couple of drinks
I’m saving my social battery for when I come cause I know you’ll want to go out
I’ll try to keep up hey
As long as we include Rands on our itinerary
Yeah I’ve been wanting to go to rands too
Enjoy your drinks tho I’m just gonna order food and take my meds
How have you not been yet😂any place you’ve really enjoyed as yet?
If you were feeling better, I’d have any excuse to drunk call you later
You can still call me tho 😂
Knowing myself I was going to call you regardless 😂
Okay I’ll think about it and I’ll let you know 😊
Here’s my birthday budget 😂 image omitted
I am so going to be living on bread and noodles 😂
Then I might as well order a new liver from Temu 😂😂😂
Nah I’m joking I wouldn’t let you do that 😂
I’m only getting home now babe 😂
Good morning babe ❤️how are you feeling now?
You came back late how many drinks did you have?😂
I’m sorry babe, the meds aren’t helping much?
I lost count 😂but with the way my head is pounding rn, I had one too many 😂
Hectic that time I was waiting for my call😂
I know babe, I’m sorry, I didn’t wanna wake you up when I got back
They said it’s closed for the whole weekend
I’m in the shower I’ll call you back
As you said, we’re going to have fun ❤️
Are you planning on doing so?
Yeah but I still don’t have an appetite <This message was edited>
Yeah at this point you just have to force yourself to eat
I had pap and braii’d meat hey
I’d kill for braai’d meat now
Oh shame babe 😂😂😂you can only enjoy it vicariously through me
You’ll be back to living your best life soon, just make sure you don’t get feverish tonight
You’re one good nights sleep away from being 💯
Have you tried the whole sleeping with an onion slice in your sock?
I’m trying to finish off this movie then I’ll probably call it a night
You’ll call me later to say goodnight yeah ?
I was taking a break from watching your series 😂allow me
The more I talk to you, the harder it gets to watch alone 😂
I told you not watch it 😂
Okay okay, I’m halfway done with season 2, so let me just finish that then we’ll watch season 3 together next week
I thought you said you ended at season 1 👀
How should I trust you not to watch season 3 too😮‍💨
Listen I blame you😂I was thinking about you the whole time I was watching it
Finally, yeah you need to it now
And why am I waking up looking for you next to me😔Honestly can’t wait to wake up next to your beautiful face 😍
I know it’s still early but I need an update regarding your thoughts on what you want to do on your birthday
I know that’s why we’re buying the birthday cake 😅
Atleast we like the same flavor 😂
Is it safe to say that for ice cream it’s tin roof?
Glad we’re on the same page
That is more random than my thought 😂😂😂
Is there a story behind how you found out?
My mom loves pumpkins so everytime she makes pumpkin squash I would sneeze a lot and my sinuses would act up
😂😂idk why I’m laughing so bad rn
Luckily it’s not something that’s always laying around otherwise I’d sneak a small bit in your food whenever you piss me off 😂😂😂
I really need to stop with this dark humor 💀
I’m outchea looking for a way for it sound cute if I say yes 😂😂😂😂
No, I am trying to spend the rest of my life with you though 😂so killing you is nowhere close to the agenda
At this point you’ve probably diagnosed me as psycho already 😂😂😂
I went for padel with the mates but I’m doing more of chilling than playing 😂
And what have you been up to?
I was dragged here, I did not sign up to be here 😂😂
Lol and what do you wanna do with your hair?
I’m gonna go to the salon to wash it
Someone mentioned something about weaves and installations 👀😂
So are you just going to keep it natural after washing?
Is that what you want to rock for your birthday?
Should I even ask how much this weave is or I’ll faint?
No I don’t need a new weave 😂
The salon is closed I’ll go tomorrow
Babe but I was also playing though (barely)😂
You’re done undoing your hair now?
What in the meals is that? But didn’t you order though?
Ay 😂atleast I moved my body. Did you end up going for a walk?
I did I ordered bread and eggs
And she can still move her body 😂how are you feeling after the walk?
It was windy outside my nose is blocked now
Argh I’m sorry babe, I hope it’s not hectic though
I was showering and all, now I have to cook 🤦🏾‍♂️
Hate might be a strong word 😂😂😂
I made pap and pork trotters
I’ll call you back babe, let me just finish eating and doing the dishes
Please tell me you’ve completely healed up now
Not completely but I’m getting there
But yeah besides this, like how are you? As in you you, how are you doing ?
I’m great babe, I just need time to move a little faster so that it’s next Thursday already
Yeah this is going to be one of the longest weeks of the year
But I guess we’ll be okay
Did I not attempt to work 😂I closed my laptop after like 5 minutes
I’m probably just going to be talking to you, I do need to get a haircut at some point
Still going to the salon today?
Oh you cutting your hair today?
Yeah I can’t even video call you in peace cause I look like a hobho
Now you’re just selling me dreams
Clearly my ancestors are working overtime
Argh how I wish I was cuddling you rn. 10 more days 🤦🏾‍♂️
Yeah but I hope it gets hot when you get here
Is this you trying to avoid cuddles with me 😂
Yeah I can relate hey, it only struck me late that we’re getting into winter so the weather is going to be crappy
I haven’t heard your voice today
Yes I’ll definitely do the onion thing tonight
You better babe <This message was edited>
I’m going to get the car washed and have some pap
I’ll call you in abit yeah?
Another morning waking up looking for you next to me 😔I hope you slept well and that you’re feeling better today ❤️
I feel so much better today
Yaaaaayyyy my baby is finally feeling better
I’m doing great babe, the weather just decided to wake up and choose violence
And you’re making me come to Cape Town during winter 😂😂😂pure evil at work
Let’s see who’s prayers get answered 😂
Okay babe, try take it easy so that you fully recover hey❤️
Hey babe, just checking in, hope your day is going well and that you’re still nursing yourself and feeling better now❤️
Hey I’m doing good and you?
I’m good hey, I was just missing someone
Of course I miss you babe 🥰
I’m going to the salon now 🧍🏽‍♀️
Let me know when you’re back
I’ll call you when you’re settled yeah
Missed video call  Tap to call back
31 Avenhoorn Close, Cape Town, Western Cape 7441
Good morning mi amor ❤️hope you slept well cause I did, I kept replaying your voice in my head throughout the night 😊
I love waking up to these sweet messages 🤭
That time I thought I was annoying you😂better get used to them cause as long as I’m not waking up next to you you’re defs waking to such 😘
I’m good thanks babe, how are you feeling today?
I’m good too🤭 <This message was edited>
Please tell me you’re completely healed now 👀
I’m getting my haircut and then I’m going to go to the office for abit 🤦🏾‍♂️
Thank you babe, same to you ❤️
I’m supposed to be working but I’m outchea thinking about you 🤦🏾‍♂️
I’m focusing on what matters most
No it’s not me you’re losing the plot😭
No you’re the one missing the plot trying to deprive me of thinking about my special somebody
I say “losing” wena you say “missing “ kore I’m the retarded one neh?😂😂
I did call you my ‘special’ somebody
I wanna hear your voice, quick call?
This is literally me every time I hear your voice 😍
I think you’re obsessed with me😌
I’m sitting on the balcony with my friend
I just got into bed now so I’m watching an episode or 2
I just started this series called Butterfly, it’s not too bad after all
It’s about a spy guy who ran away from his kid and has to come out of hiding because his past caught up with him and now he has to rescue the kid
Oh no my lips are sealed 😂
None yet hey 😂😂😂see I’m a decent human who watches decent things
Allow me hey, my brain is PG-13😂
I’ll probably only sleep when I’m talking to you so whenever that is
Oh you can call me whenever
I don’t wanna hijack you from your friend though
Okay babe, let me finish off this episode then
Have you ever tried Nigerian food?
Oh no you can miss me on that one, I’m not a fan
We can babe, I’ll be a spectator 😂
Babe have you seen what their food looks like 😂
I hope your tummy is strong babe
Clearly you just enjoy being babied when you’re not feeling well 😂
Like how do you mix tripe and fish in one dish 😂
Tripe is already disgusting on its own😂😂
Okay okay we see you miss boujee 😂😂
I’m giving you side eyes rn babe 😂😂
We’re going to buy food neh I’ll call you when I come back unless if you’ll be asleep?
I’m not a fan but I do enjoy if I come across some properly cooked ones
Okay babe, I’ll be here, be safe ❤️

Good morning you ❤️
I feel like mornings would be a lot better if you were right here with me, just saying 😌
Hope you woke up feeling amazing today❤️
Thanks for the lovely message, how are you?
I’m doing great thanks and yourself?
I’m glad you’re feeling proper now
I’m debating with myself whether to go to the office or not 😂
I’m also debating if I should go to campus or not 😂
Noooo😂what’s your excuse for not going
How is that even an excuse 😂😂😂
Yeah my body is also just tired hey
And the code at my other job broke so I need to get that sorted out
No this one I work completely remotely so that’s my excuse for staying home today 😂
Oh that’s good for you then 😂
Are you planning on studying at home or you’ll be chilling?
Give me a quick call before you head out yeah
Have a good day ❤️I’ll be here if you need anything
Hey, I’m in class the lecturer just told us we are writing on the 21st of April😭
😂😂😂someone is going to have a rough weekend
Don’t stress about it, we’ll find some time to sneak in a study session
And that also means no going out for you this weekend 😂😂😂😂
Do as you please, just don’t dare and try hijack my quality time with you 🤷🏾‍♂️😂
Nah I won’t I just have to manage my time very well
I’m in the library writing my assignment 💔
Ncccwwwaaaaa look at you , how’s that going
Eish all I can say is I’m trying
Can I have R50 for lunch?🧍🏽‍♀️
Look at my little ponytail 🤭🤣🤣 image omitted
Look at my little ponytail 🤭🤣🤣 image omitted
Sorry I got distracted, I was busy admiring your beautiful face
You said what about the ponytail 😂 <This message was edited>
Actually you’re just trying to show off how you effortlessly just look beautiful 😍
Very boring anker my friend was not there
😂shame did you atleast manage to get some work done?
Yeah I did one page I’m gonna do another one tomorrow 😮‍💨
You know what, we listen and we don’t judge
Oh trust me, you probably managed to do more work than I did today
I’m gonna take a nap neh
Babe I’m sorry I passed out as soon as I got into bed

Good morning beautiful ❤️
I can’t lie, I think I’m starting to enjoy waking up knowing you’re mine to talk to
Hope your day starts as good as you make mine
It was meh cause I didn’t talk to someone’s child before I slept
Anker you chose to sleep wena. You can’t be in a relationship and sleep you must choose one🫩😂
What do you mean struggle? You’re the one who was day drinking yesterday 🤣
I have no excuse babe, imma just blame everything on the alcohol because wtf 😂
That time today feels like a good day to day drink again 😂
We Listen and we don’t judge 😂😂😂
Nothing much, I’m just gonna write my test and finish my assignment
Are you gonna go to campus?
It’s a Friday babe, take it easy
Now you’re making me consider not going to the office
No you just wanna stay home and drink 😂
No I want to talk to my girl
Yeah yeah, let me get ready for work
I’ll call you before I jump out
I'll call you when this hun goes for lunch
You should have sent me proper pictures then 😂
You're just depriving me of seeing your beautiful face 🤦🏾‍♂️😂
Did you write your test already?
Not too bad (I cheated throughout the whole test😬)
This hun decided not to go for lunch🤦🏾‍♂️
Seeing your face and hearing your voice is really refreshing
I’m glad my crusty face makes you happy
Well hopefully i'll be waking up to your 'crusty' face for the rest of our lives so im not bothered 😂😂plus that whole beauty is in the eye of the nton nton
Hae if you’re saying that I’m relieved keh 😂
Okay did you enjoy the rest of your day?
It actually wasn’t too bad, I just feel drained for some reason
It was great honestly. Very productive
So what are you doing now?
I’m glad you managed to be productive
Lol you know what I’m doing babe 😂what are you up to
Is this you only bathing now 😂😂😂
I don’t know shem but my friend is here we’re sitting on the balcony with no plan 😂
Okay I’ll call you in a bit babe
Don’t you want to send the rest of the pictures in your gallery to me for safe keeping?
I can’t stop staring at your face 😍
Are you done playing your game?
No I’m waiting for this guy to finish cooking 🤦🏾‍♂️
I’ve been waiting for food this whole time
I don’t know why I’m being starved
Because someone here is on a diet so some of us have to suffer for that
Are you going to sleep now?
No I’ll wait up on you
Okay I’m going to my room
Okay babe, I hope I’m not rushing you

Good morning beautiful ❤️
I feel like I need to start charging you rent at this point cause you can’t be outchea living rent free in my mind🤔
Nah I’m sending you an invoice, I take payment in cash or cuddles
Yeah but I had a weird dream
You wanna tell me about it?
I was in a fight with a little person😂
Babe🤗are you okay? Does this happen often?
Ehh I also don’t know him🤣
Nah I think it’s because I went to sleep high
Clearly you don’t 👀😂I just thought it was random white person 😂😂😂
😂😂😂yeah someone was lit yesterday, I enjoyed your laughs
I’m at the car wash with the homies, we’re about to have pap
It was a parody but definitely not funny
We were literally on a video call just now 😂
What time is your test on Friday?
You have to be on campus by 9?
Okay so I might have to change my flight cause it was for 2pm on Tuesday
Are you sure you’re going to be fine?
